steps.title: Find the similarity scale
steps.content:
Because segment $LK$ is parallel to segment $RT$, triangle $SLK$ is similar to triangle $SRT$. Compare corresponding sides.
$$
\frac{LK}{RT}=\frac{28}{84}=\frac{1}{3}
$$

steps.title: Find the full base
steps.content:
Triangle $RST$ is right at $T$, so use the area formula with legs $RT$ and $ST$.
$$
1{,}050=\frac{1}{2}(84)(ST)
$$
$$
1{,}050=42(ST)
$$
$$
ST=25
$$

steps.title: Subtract the similar segment
steps.content: The smaller similar triangle has scale factor $\frac{1}{3}$, so $$ SK=\frac{1}{3}(25)=\frac{25}{3} $$ Then subtract from the full length. $$ KT=25-\frac{25}{3}=\frac{50}{3} $$ The answer is 50/3.
